location_on Himachal Pradesh, India

Spiti Valley Expedition

Journey through the high-altitude desert of the Himalayas. Experience ancient monasteries, surreal landscapes, and the raw beauty of the middle land.

calendar_clock Duration 6 Days, 5 Nights
groups Group Size 12-15 Explorers
terrain Difficulty Moderate
star Rating 4.9 (120+ reviews)

route The Itinerary

Arrive at base camp. Spend the day acclimatizing to the altitude. We'll have a brief orientation session in the evening, followed by a welcome dinner with the group kaptains. Explore local heritage and rest.

An early start. Witness dramatic changes in landscape as we drive through valleys and high altitude passes. The drive offers stunning panoramic views of rugged snow-capped mountains and pristine crystal rivers.

Visit the iconic local sights and ancient spiritual hubs perched on hillsides. Later, explore the highest inhabited villages. Capture epic travel memories and interact with welcoming local community members.

Starting from
₹24,999 / person

info Prices inclusive of all taxes
